reasoning: The provided design spec, architecture, and API contract are clear and sufficient to implement the core features of the Todo application. The implementation uses React with Hooks for state management and TailwindCSS for styling, as specified. The code is structured into reusable components for maintainability. An API client is created to handle all backend communication according to the contract. The delete confirmation modal is also implemented as per the requirements.

other_components.name: Header
AddTodoForm
TodoList
TodoItem
ConfirmationModal

fe_code.styles: TailwindCSS utility classes are used directly in the JSX of each component. No separate CSS file is needed. The classes align with the style guide provided (e.g., bg-slate-100 for background, bg-blue-500 for primary actions, text-slate-800 for text).
fe_code.instructions:
1. Ensure you have Node.js and npm installed.
2. Set up a new React project: `npx create-react-app my-todo-app`
3. Install TailwindCSS: Follow the official guide at https://tailwindcss.com/docs/guides/create-react-app
4. Replace the contents of `src/` with the provided component and API client files.
5. Update your main `src/index.js` to render the `TodoApp` component.
6. Run the development server: `npm start`.
7. Make sure the backend API server is running at `http://localhost:8000`.
